LightningComponentBundle.description: Hero banner for the B2B Connect home page.

property.name: subheadline
property.label: Subheadline
property.default: Find genuine replacement parts, accessories, and supplies for all Capsa Healthcare products. Fast shipping, expert support, and easy B2B ordering.

property.name: registerPage
property.label: Register Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for the Request Account button.

property.name: ordersPage
property.label: Orders Card Page (API name, optional)
property.description: Leave blank: the Orders card opens the standard Order Summary list. Set a custom route API name only to override that destination.

property.name: invoicesPage
property.label: Invoices Card Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for the Invoices card.

property.name: quotesPage
property.label: Quotes Card Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for the Quotes card.

property.name: supportPage
property.label: Support Cases Card Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for the Support Cases card.

property.name: loginPage
property.label: Login Page (API name, legacy)
property.description: No longer used; guests use the typed login page.
